retrieved_result: Scripting This article is a portal for reference articles for scripting in Roblox. If you want beginner tutorials instead, go to the Intro_to_Scripting page. Contents [ hide ]1 Lua Programming Language2 Tutorials3 Environments and Libraries4 Math5 Types5.1 Basic Types5.2 Roblox-Defined Types6 Global Functions
Decision_Reason: The page discusses Roblox scripting and Lua tutorials, not IDEs or software development environments; does not address top IDEs for software development.
